item.text: {"case_id":"mtj-004","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"Assistant did not directly write a launch announcement only. It first challenged the framing that green tests alone do not imply release readiness, then added gray release, monitoring, rollback, user impact, risk acceptance, and release-owner confirmation into the announcement wording. This matches the expected input-framing audit behavior."}
